title: Pleiarina coluteoides
taxonomy: Pleiarina coluteoides is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is native to southern Africa and is commonly found in the mountains of the western part of the continent. The classification of Pleiarina coluteoides places it within the kingdom Plantae, further classified into the division Magnoliophyta and the class Magnoliopsida. Within the class Magnoliopsida, it is placed in the order Celastrales and the family Celastraceae. This classification highlights its unique characteristics and relationships within the plant kingdom.
benefits: Pleiarina coluteoides, also known as the honeycomb daisy, is a plant with potential health benefits.
